questionHtml: Explain the general increase in trend in the first ionization energies of the period 3 elements, Na to Ar.
markschemeHtml:
increasing number of protons

OR

increasing nuclear charge ✔

 

«atomic» radius/size decreases

OR

same number of shells/electrons occupy same shell

OR

similar shielding «by inner electrons» ✔

meta.title: Explain the general increase in trend in the first ionization energies of the period 3 elements, Na to Ar.
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 3.1—The periodic table: Classification of elements
Structure 3.1.3—Periodicity refers to trends in properties of elements across a period and down a group.
